extensions.description: Select the suite-pinned descriptor for each selected component id.

stability.rationale: Exact-suite policy id is frozen for suite snapshot install, rollback, and archive semantics.
stability.replacement_target: Introduce a new policy id if suite-pinned semantics ever change.

extensions.description: Select the highest compatible non-yanked descriptor per component id.

stability.rationale: Latest-compatible policy id is frozen with deterministic tie-break semantics.
stability.replacement_target: Introduce a new policy id if deterministic latest-compatible ranking changes.

extensions.description: Select the highest compatible descriptor per component id, including experimental or yanked candidates only when explicitly requested.

stability.rationale: Lab policy is intentionally opt-in and may evolve with experimental acquisition policy.
stability.replacement_target: Replace with a trust-governed experimental acquisition policy family when remote indices are formalized.
